chunks.page_summary: This page details how Rheonics inline process viscometers and density meters can be integrated with various Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs) using multiple communication protocols.
product_names: Rheonics inline process density meter SRD
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Connecting process density meter and viscometer to leading PLC

Modified on: Mon, 11 Nov, 2024 at 6:24 PM

PLC, or Programmable Logic Controller, is a key component in industrial automation and control systems. It serves as a digital computer that is designed to control and monitor different processes within manufacturing environments. PLCs are widely used across various industries to enhance efficiency, improve productivity, and ensure reliable operation. Here are five paragraphs to provide an overview of PLCs.

This article shows how Rheonics inline process viscometer SRV and inline process density meter SRD support most of the leading PLC in quick integration of viscosity, density and temperature data over various digital and analog protocols.

Rheonics sensors support natively a multitude of analog and digital communication protocols from 4-20mA, HART, Ethernet/IP, Modbus RTU/TCP, Profinet to CAN and soon to be available IO-Link. Check the PLC you pan to use and see examples of how Rheonics sensors have been successfully connected to them.

TABLE OF CONTENTS
* Introduction to Programmable Logic Controllers (PLC)
* Functionality and Programming of PLC
* Applications of PLC
* Key providers of PLC and how to integrate Rheonics density meter and viscometers to them.
* Siemens
* Allen Bradley (Rockwell Automation)
* ABB
* B&R Automation
* Mitsubishi Electric
* Omron
* Delta
* Honeywell Process
* Emerson
* Schneider Electric
* Yokogawa
* Bosch Rexroth
* Keyence
* IDEC
* Panasonic
* Fuji Electric
* Toshiba
* Beckhoff
* Wago
key_facts: PLC, or Programmable Logic Controller, is a key component in industrial automation and control systems.

Rheonics inline process viscometer SRV and inline process density meter SRD support most of the leading PLC in quick integration of viscosity, density and temperature data over various digital and analog protocols.
Rheonics sensors support natively a multitude of analog and digital communication protocols including 4-20mA, HART, Ethernet/IP, Modbus RTU/TCP, Profinet, CAN, and soon IO-Link.

Rheonics sensor integration protocol: Profinet (https://us.profinet.com/) and Modbus TCP/IP (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000217062)
key_facts: The image displays EHV+ Series modules from Hitachi.
Phoenix Contact offers a wide range of PLC solutions for industrial automation.
The Axioline series from Phoenix Contact provides flexible and reliable control options.
The Axioline series enables seamless integration with other devices in an automation system.
Phoenix Contact PLC solutions adhere to IEC 61131 standards for classic control technology.
The engineering tool for Phoenix Contact products is PLC-PC Worx, with a specific product ID srt-2701680.
Rheonics sensors can be integrated using the Profinet protocol.
Rheonics sensors can be integrated using the Modbus TCP/IP protocol.

chunks.page_summary: This page describes the integration of Rheonics sensors with LS Electric and Unitronics Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), detailing relevant products, engineering tools, and communication protocols.
product_names: Unitronics integrated PLC and HMI solutions
chunks.extracted_text:
Figure 24. DirectLogic205-Koyo Electronics.

LS Electric (LS Industrial Systems)
LS Electric is spin-out from South Korean conglomerate LG Electronics. Their XG5000 series PLCs offer advanced control capabilities and seamless integration with other LS products.
Engineering tool: XG5000 programming software (https://ssg.ls-electric.com/ww/en/product/document/3103)
Rheonics sensor integration protocol: Modbus TCP/RTU (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000217005) and Ethernet/IP (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000288489).

Figure 25. XGK CPU Controller-LS Electric

Unitronics
Unitronics is a global provider of integrated PLC and HMI solutions. Their product range includes programmable logic controllers with built-in touchscreens, offering a user-friendly interface for easy programming and monitoring.
Engineering tool: https://www.unitronicsplc.com/software-unilogic-for-programmable-controllers/ (https://www.unitronicsplc.com/software-unilogic-for-programmable-controllers/)
Rheonics sensor integration protocol: Ethernet/IP (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000288489) and Modbus TCP/RTU (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000217005).
key_facts: LS Electric is a spin-out from South Korean conglomerate LG Electronics.
LS Electric's XG5000 series PLCs provide advanced control capabilities and seamless integration with other LS products.
Rheonics sensors integrate with LS Electric systems using Modbus TCP/RTU and Ethernet/IP protocols.
Unitronics is a global provider of integrated PLC and HMI solutions.
Unitronics' product range includes programmable logic controllers with built-in touchscreens.
Unitronics products offer a user-friendly interface for easy programming and monitoring.
Rheonics sensors integrate with Unitronics systems using Ethernet/IP and Modbus TCP/RTU protocols.

chunks.page_summary: This page provides an overview of OpenPLC and AutomationX systems, detailing their functionalities, engineering tools, and supported communication protocols for integration, and features an image of a Unitronics PLC+HMI display.
chunks.extracted_text:
Figure 26. Unitronics PLC+HMI.

OPEN PLC
OpenPLC is an open-source Programmable Logic Controller (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Programmable_logic_controller) that is based on an easy to use software. It is the first fully functional standardized open-source PLC, both in software and hardware. For more information: https://openplcproject.com/ (https://openplcproject.com/)
Engineering tool: OpenPLC Editor (https://openplcproject.com/docs/installing-openplc-editor/)
Rheonics sensor integration protocol: Modbus TCP
(https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000217005)
Rheonics also has a few integration projects that we successfully developed in Codesys on Raspberry Pi, find below the support article where we explain how to integrate:
https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000409807-profinet-communication-through-codesys (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000409807-profinet-communication-through-codesys)
https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000298114 (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000298114)
https://www.codesys.com/ (https://www.codesys.com/)

AutomationX
AutomationX is a highly scalable and modular DCS (Distributed Control System) specifically designed to support various industrial applications. Its architecture enables seamless adaptation for both small plants and complex distributed control systems, ensuring flexibility and reliability across various industries.
Engineering tool: aXIDE-Engineering
Supported protocols: Modbus RTU
(https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000217005) and Profibus.
(https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000292663)
key_facts: OpenPLC is an open-source Programmable Logic Controller based on easy-to-use software.
OpenPLC is the first fully functional standardized open-source PLC available in both software and hardware.
The engineering tool for OpenPLC is OpenPLC Editor.
Rheonics sensors integrate with OpenPLC using the Modbus TCP protocol.
Rheonics has successfully developed integration projects in Codesys on Raspberry Pi.
AutomationX is a highly scalable and modular Distributed Control System (DCS).
AutomationX is designed to support various industrial applications and ensures flexibility and reliability.
The engineering tool for AutomationX is aXIDE-Engineering.
AutomationX supports Modbus RTU and Profibus protocols.
